children.text: Hi team, just a reminder about our meeting tomorrow at 10 AM. Please come prepared with your project updates.

children.className: hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground flex flex-col items-start gap-2 border-b p-4 text-sm leading-tight whitespace-nowrap last:border-b-0

children.text: Thanks for the update. The progress looks great so far. Let's schedule a call to discuss the next steps.

children.className: hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground flex flex-col items-start gap-2 border-b p-4 text-sm leading-tight whitespace-nowrap last:border-b-0

children.text: Hey everyone! I'm thinking of organizing a team outing this weekend. Would you be interested in a hiking trip or a beach day?

children.className: hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground flex flex-col items-start gap-2 border-b p-4 text-sm leading-tight whitespace-nowrap last:border-b-0

children.text: I've reviewed the budget numbers you sent over. Can we set up a quick call to discuss some potential adjustments?

children.className: hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground flex flex-col items-start gap-2 border-b p-4 text-sm leading-tight whitespace-nowrap last:border-b-0

children.text: Please join us for an all-hands meeting this Friday at 3 PM. We have some exciting news to share about the company's future.

children.className: hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground flex flex-col items-start gap-2 border-b p-4 text-sm leading-tight whitespace-nowrap last:border-b-0

children.text: Thank you for sending over the proposal. I've reviewed it and have some thoughts. Could we schedule a meeting to discuss my feedback in detail?

children.className: hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground flex flex-col items-start gap-2 border-b p-4 text-sm leading-tight whitespace-nowrap last:border-b-0

children.text: I've been brainstorming and came up with an interesting project concept. Do you have time this week to discuss its potential impact and feasibility?

children.className: hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground flex flex-col items-start gap-2 border-b p-4 text-sm leading-tight whitespace-nowrap last:border-b-0

children.text: Just a heads up that I'll be taking a two-week vacation next month. I'll make sure all my projects are up to date before I leave.

children.className: hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground flex flex-col items-start gap-2 border-b p-4 text-sm leading-tight whitespace-nowrap last:border-b-0

children.text: I've completed the registration for the upcoming tech conference. Let me know if you need any additional information from my end.

children.className: hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground flex flex-col items-start gap-2 border-b p-4 text-sm leading-tight whitespace-nowrap last:border-b-0

children.text: To celebrate our recent project success, I'd like to organize a team dinner. Are you available next Friday evening? Please let me know your preferences.
